message:
test(indexer): pin staged_field_or_null contract from #201 fix (91dfa426)

91dfa426 added the helper that nulls out the staged-pipeline counters
when the lexical rebuild isn't running, fixing the false signal that
misled #201 reporters into chasing a #196-class workers_max=0 bug.
That fix didn't ship a unit test for the helper itself.

Adding one now so the contract is pinned: during rebuild the value
flows through verbatim (including legitimate zeros from a controller
that's running but currently has no allowed jobs); outside rebuild
the field is JSON null regardless of the underlying counter, so a
future refactor can't quietly regress this back to "0 means broken".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
